prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-6I1CUM-2PC-55X1-GRN-FBA Product Type: MULTITOOL Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor 6 in 1 Camping Utensil Camp Kitchen Multi-Tool with Carrying Case and Bottle Opener Description: Perfect for camping, backpacking, hiking, trekking and more, the 6 in 1 camping flatware cutlery set has a knife, fork, spoon, corkscrew, bottle opener and nylon storage pouch with belt loop so you can easily tote the utensil holder with you on any camping, picnic or off road outdoors adventure.

This portable cutlery utensil silverware set is an ASR Outdoor essential must have to pack for full-day hikes, camping trips, off road adventures, backpacking, trekking, climbing and more. With five convenient tool components and a great nylon storage pouch with belt loop, you'll find it comes in handy for more than just meal prep or eating.

This functional folding utility knife tool, all the components are detachable and reattachable or retractable, making the camping cutlery set compact in design and easy to maneuver. Measuring just five inches long when completely closed, the portable flatware camping set is easy to pack in a bug out bag, emergency preparedness or survival kit, hiking backpack, camping gear, so you never have to worry about missing out on any delicious campfire cooking or being stuck with no way to open a bottle a wine or beer. Search Terms: camping utensil outdoor camping accessories gear stove cookware eating open fire cooking camp eatting utensil plates backpacking spork survival kids marshmello stick Features: - 6 IN 1 CAMPING UTENSIL SET: Perfect for camping, the 6 in 1 flatware cutlery set has a knife, fork, spoon, corkscrew, bottle opener - NYLON VELCRO STORAGE POUCH: Increase the longevity of your camping cutlery utensil silverware by securing it in the velcro storage pouch when not in use; this velcro storage pouch flatware carrier case was specially designed for this cutlery set - DURABLE STEEL & PLASTIC CONSTRUCTION: Made from stainless steel and sturdy plastic, durable but lightweight, this utility knife tool camping cutlery is a reliable tool that will withstand lots of wear and tear - MINIMALIST COMPACT DESIGN: Measuring just 5 inches in length, the compact and portable camping flatware cutlery utensil set is ergonomic and minimalist in design; fork and spoon are detachable and retractable when not in use - REUSABLE CAMPING FLATWARE TOOLS: The utensil set is 100% reusable, making it a great and environmentally friendly choice over disposable plastic cutlery === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Max. 250 characters === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 6-in-1 Camping Utensil Multi-Tool with Case
